error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the dspremote API. Check host, port, HTTPS, and that the server is running.

user.title: Connect to dspremote
user.description: Enter the host and port of your running dspremote API server. On the next step you can pick which fields become Home Assistant entities.

paths.title: Choose fields
paths.description: Select paths from your device. Only these fields get entities (you can change this later in integration options). Use “Additional paths” for wildcards such as /out/*/gain if you need patterns not shown in the list.

error.cannot_connect: Could not refresh the path list from dspremote. You can still edit “Additional paths”, then save.

init.title: dspremote fields
init.description: Pick fields from the current discovery list. Patterns that do not appear in the list (for example wildcards) stay in “Additional paths”.
